description_long: This church features a striking blue and white exterior with classical architectural elements, including a prominent central dome and a tall, multi-tiered bell tower topped with a spire. The main entrance is accentuated by a portico supported by four columns, leading into the main body of the building. The structure is symmetrical, with rectangular side wings flanking the central dome, and decorative moldings outlining windows and doors. The bell tower rises above the main facade, with arched openings and layered cornices, culminating in a pointed spire. The roof surfaces are mostly gray, contrasting with the vibrant blue walls and white trim. The overall design suggests a blend of Neoclassical and Baroque influences, with a focus on grandeur and verticality.
description: A blue and white church with a central dome, tall bell tower, and columned entrance, featuring classical architectural details and symmetrical wings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the central dome, columned portico, and the full height of the bell tower with its spire.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the portico entrance, symmetrical wings, and the bell tower directly behind the dome.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the dome, portico, and bell tower.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the base of the bell tower, rear facade details, and the symmetry of the building's structure.
